suppress.notes:
file name: log4j-api-2.24.3.jar
This vulnerability is fixed in 2.25.4.
Spring boot versions 4.0.0+ imports 2.25.4.
The project does not satisfy the narrow conditions that CVE requires, and therefore not explitable.

file name: log4j-api-2.24.3.jar
This vulnerability is fixed in 2.25.4.
Spring boot versions 4.0.0+ imports 2.25.4.
The project does not satisfy the narrow conditions that CVE requires, and therefore not explitable.

file name: log4j-to-slf4j-2.24.3.jar
This vulnerability is fixed in 2.25.4.
Spring boot versions 4.0.0+ imports 2.25.4.
The project does not satisfy the narrow conditions that CVE requires, and therefore not explitable.

file name: log4j-to-slf4j-2.24.3.jar
This vulnerability is fixed in 2.25.4.
Spring boot versions 4.0.0+ imports 2.25.4.
The project does not satisfy the narrow conditions that CVE requires, and therefore not explitable.

file name: netty-transport-native-epoll-4.1.132.Final-linux-x86_64.jar
This is a false positive. The vulnerability is introduced in 4.2.0 and fixed in 4.1.13, and therefore this package version (at 4.1.x) is not affected.
See https://github.com/github/advisory-database/pull/7608 for the correction.

file name: spring-security-web-6.5.10.jar
This is a false positive. The vulnerability is introduced in 7.0.0 and fixed in 7.0.5.
See https://spring.io/security/cve-2026-22747.
